rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL J. MOATS ET AL VS. MICHAEL TSANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder Of Defendant And Cross-Defendant, Addy Wong, D.B.A. Aw Construction Company In Motion Of Defendants Nrt West, Inc. To Bifurcate Issues Of Statute Of Limitations And Punitive Damags
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 8, 2025 line 1. DEFENDANT ADDY WONG D.B.A. A W CONSTRUCTION COMPANY Joinder Of Defendant And Cross-Defendant, Addy Wong, D.B.A. Aw Construction Company In Motion Of Defendants Nrt West, Inc. To Bifurcate Issues Of Statute Of Limitations And Punitive Damags is transferred to Department 301 to be heard on May 9, 2025 at 9:30 a.m. per the Order of the Presiding Judge. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. DANIEL SALCIDO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 8, 2025 line 4. DEFENDANT RUBEN CHAVARRIA HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION is DENIED. Prejudgment claim of right to possession was served in accordance with CCP 415.46 on March 3, 2025, and the time to complete and submit a prejudgment claim of right has expired. The judgment entered on April 3, 2025 therefore applies to all occupants, and claimant may not now object to the enforcement of that judgment. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 8, 2025 line 6. DEFENDANT DARRAYAH SANCHEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT HEARING REQUIRED. rulings.Case Title: CHEH LEE VS. CHRISTOPHER J. MYRON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 8, 2025 line 8. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MYRON MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED. Defendant has sufficiently shown that the default and default judgment were taken against him as a result of his mistake or excusable neglect. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 8, 2025 line 9. DEFENDANT CHUNLEI LIU Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is DENIED. The events defendant describes constitute personal service under CCP 415.10. Defendant has not cited any authority that would invalidate this service which otherwise meets the statutory requirements. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
